cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)
project(Meikyu LANGUAGES C)

# Builds ONLY the engine exe (the stable binary), once per machine. Every
# project build -- game dlls, shaders, ship bundles, even rebuilding this
# exe -- is a kaji target generated by the running engine. MinGW/Linux gcc
# required for game dlls: seni's layout embedding uses GNU .incbin.

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(VENDOR_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../vendor")
set(DODAI_DIR  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/dodai")

# --- build.manifest: single source of truth ------------------------------
# Host sources, include roots, the per-OS dodai source, and the SDL version
# all come from build.manifest -- the SAME file project_gen reads at runtime,
# so the bootstrapped binary and the self-rebuilt one stay TU-for-TU identical.
# build.manifest is authoritative for these; there is no separate cmake list
# to drift (that drift is exactly what this whole mechanism prevents).
file(STRINGS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/build.manifest" MANIFEST_LINES)
set(HOST_SOURCES "")
set(HOST_INCLUDES "")
set(DODAI_OS_SRC "")
set(SDL_VERSION "")
foreach(line IN LISTS MANIFEST_LINES)
  string(STRIP "${line}" line)
  if(line STREQUAL "" OR line MATCHES "^#")
    # blank / comment
  elseif(line MATCHES "^host_src[ \t]+(.+)$")
    list(APPEND HOST_SOURCES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
  elseif(line MATCHES "^include_root[ \t]+(.+)$")
    list(APPEND HOST_INCLUDES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
  elseif(line MATCHES "^sdl_version[ \t]+(.+)$")
    set(SDL_VERSION "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
  elseif(line MATCHES "^platform[ \t]+([a-z]+)[ \t]+(.+)$")
    set(_pname "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
    set(_prest "${CMAKE_MATCH_2}")
    if( (APPLE AND _pname STREQUAL "mac") OR
        (WIN32 AND _pname STREQUAL "windows") OR
        (NOT APPLE AND NOT WIN32 AND _pname STREQUAL "linux") )
      if(_prest MATCHES "dodai=([^ \t]+)")
        set(DODAI_OS_SRC "${DODAI_DIR}/${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
      endif()
    endif()
  endif()
endforeach()

if(DODAI_OS_SRC STREQUAL "")
  message(FATAL_ERROR "build.manifest: no platform row matched this OS")
endif()
if(SDL_VERSION STREQUAL "")
  message(FATAL_ERROR "build.manifest: no sdl_version")
endif()
list(APPEND HOST_SOURCES "${DODAI_OS_SRC}")

# --- SDL3 ----------------------------------------------------------------
# Windows: vendored prebuilt MinGW binaries (batteries included).
# Linux/mac: built from source once via FetchContent (shared, so game dlls
# resolve SDL symbols from the already-loaded library at dlopen time).
# The version tag comes from build.manifest (sdl_version), not hardcoded here.
if(WIN32)
  list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${VENDOR_DIR}/SDL3-mingw/x86_64-w64-mingw32")
  find_package(SDL3 CONFIG REQUIRED)
else()
  include(FetchContent)
  set(SDL_SHARED ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(SDL_STATIC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(SDL_TEST_LIBRARY OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  FetchContent_Declare(SDL3
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL.git
    GIT_TAG ${SDL_VERSION}
    GIT_SHALLOW TRUE)
  FetchContent_MakeAvailable(SDL3)
endif()

add_executable(meikyu ${HOST_SOURCES})

target_include_directories(meikyu PRIVATE ${HOST_INCLUDES})
target_link_libraries(meikyu PRIVATE SDL3::SDL3)
if(NOT WIN32)
  target_link_libraries(meikyu PRIVATE pthread) # dodai's copy worker threads
endif()
target_compile_options(meikyu PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra)

if(WIN32)
  add_custom_command(TARGET meikyu POST_BUILD
    COMMAND "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" -E copy_if_different
      "${VENDOR_DIR}/SDL3-mingw/x86_64-w64-mingw32/bin/SDL3.dll"
      "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:meikyu>/SDL3.dll")
endif()
